task: Implement the following plan: # Always-Visible Git URL in AppHeader ## Context The repository URL is currently displayed inside the Summary tab body, which scrolls out of view when the user browses the report tabs (Errors, Suggestions, Context, etc.). The user wants the URL to remain visible at all times while navigating the report. Since `AppHeader` is already `sticky top-0 z-50`, adding the URL there is the minimal and correct solution. ## Approach Add a centered repo name/link to the AppHeader's existing single row when an evaluation is active. Between the logo (left) and nav links (right), show the extracted repository name as a small GitHub-icon + clickable link. This leverages the `justify-between` flex layout: logo on left, repo in center, nav on right. - No new component, no new fixed bar, no z-index juggling - Disappears when no evaluation is active (keeps the header clean on the home/empty state) - For GitHub URLs: show extracted repo name (e.g. `user/repo`) - For local paths: show the path as-is (no GitHub icon in that case) ## Files to Modify ### 1. `frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx` - Add `repositoryUrl?: string | null` to `AppHeaderProps` - Import `extractRepoName` from `../lib/formatters` - In the flex row (between logo button and nav links div), add a centered element: ```tsx {repositoryUrl && ( {/* GitHub icon (only for http URLs) */} {extractRepoName(repositoryUrl)} {/* external link icon for http URLs */} )} ``` - Wrap in an `absolute left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2` container so it stays truly centered regardless of logo/nav widths ### 2. `frontend/src/App.tsx` - Pass `currentR
